goal.name: push'vc.14
goal.expl: a.{m + 1} := v ( index is in bounds)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: ((s.pool = s8.pool) /\ mem1 st (s8.pool) /\ (st <> null) /\ ((s.alloct)[v] = Cell) /\ ((s.alloct)[st] = Stack) /\ (st <> v) /\ mem st (s8.alloct.to_fmap) /\ hasStackType s8 st)

goal.name: pop'vc.8
goal.expl: pop_car := a.{m} ( index is in bounds)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: (mem1 st s.pool /\ isAllocated s st /\ mem st pi.lor /\ pi.lor[st] = st /\ hasStackType s st)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: ( (forall x. isAllocated s7 x -> isAllocated s x) /\ (forall x. isAllocated s7 x -> hasNodeType s7 x -> hasNodeType s x) /\ (forall x. isAllocated s7 x -> hasNodeType s7 x -> (s7.car)[x] = (s.car)[x] /\ (s7.cdr)[x] = (s.cdr)[x]))

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: ( x = l_stk \/ mem1 x ((l_s1.rep)[l_stk]) \/ mem1 x (diff (l_s.alloct.to_fmap.domain) (l_s1.alloct.to_fmap.domain)) )

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: ( x = r_stk \/ mem1 x ((r_s1.rep)[r_stk]) \/ mem1 x (diff (r_s.alloct.to_fmap.domain) (r_s1.alloct.to_fmap.domain)) )

goal.name: prog'vc.190.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`arr)

goal.name: prog'vc.191.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`rep)

goal.name: prog'vc.192.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`cell_rep)

goal.name: prog'vc.194.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`size)

goal.name: prog'vc.197.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`car)

goal.name: prog'vc.200.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`slots)

goal.name: prog'vc.201.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`head)

goal.name: prog'vc.209.0.0.1.0
goal.expl: false case (true case. wr (pool union pool`rep)`cell_value)

goal.name: push'vc.7
goal.expl: a.{m + 1} := v ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: pop'vc.7
goal.expl: pop_car := a.{m} ( index is in bounds)
